title: Malaysian Pul Biber Wrap
description: A light and refreshing Malaysian dish featuring the intense flavor of pul biber, wrapped in pandan leaf.

ingredients.name: Lime Juice
ingredients.notes: balances the heat and adds brightness

instructions: Dehydrate the pandan leaves in a low oven (150°F) for 30 minutes to enhance their flavor and aroma.
In a blender or food processor, combine sambal oelek, coconut milk, lime juice, fish sauce, sugar, and pul biber. Blend until smooth.
Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a small pan over medium heat.
Add the blended filling to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes, until slightly thickened.
Add the shrimp to the pan and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until pink and cooked through.
Add the rice flour to the pan and stir to combine.
Add the bean sprouts to the pan and stir to combine.
Warm the pandan leaves in a dry pan over low heat.
Spoon the filling onto the center of each pandan leaf.
Fold the bottom half of the leaf up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the leaf to form a tight cylinder.
Serve immediately, garnished with fresh cilantro.
Repeat with the remaining filling and pandan leaves.
